zh.lifeSummary: 當Jeanne De Rely於1296年出生在法國豪-德-福朗斯帕-德-卡拉斯雷利時，她的父親Écuyer Guillaume V de Rely24歲，母親Jéhanne De Caumont16歲。她於1314年與Gilles II D'Authuille de Mailly在法國諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯帕-德-卡拉斯沙吉莫結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1363年在法國豪-德-福朗斯索姆奧圖易勒享年67歲。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Rely
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Kent and Sussex): variant of   Relph  .

variants.name: Relph
meanings: English: of Norman origin, from the Old French personal name Riulf (ancient Germanic Ricwulf, from rīc ‘power, realm’ + wulf ‘wolf’).

nameMeanings.name: Jeanne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Jane
meanings: Originally a feminine form of John , from the Old French form Je(h)anne. Since the 17th century it has proved the most popular of the feminine forms of John, ahead of Joan and Jean . It now also commonly occurs as the second element in combinations such as Sarah-Jane. In Britain it is still one of the most frequent of all girls' names. It is not a royal name, but was borne by the tragic Lady Jane Grey ( 1537–54 ), who was unwillingly proclaimed queen in 1553 , deposed nine days later, and executed the following year. Seventy years earlier, the name had come into prominence as that of Jane Shore , mistress of King Edward IV and subsequently of Thomas Grey , 1st Marquess of Dorset, Lady Jane's grandfather. Jane Shore's tribulations in 1483 at the hands of Richard III , Edward's brother and successor, became the subject of popular ballads and plays, which may well have increased the currency of the name in the 16th century. A 19th-century influence was its use as the name of the central character in Charlotte Brontë's novel Jane Eyre ( 1847 ). From 1932 to 1959 it was used as the name of a cheerful and scantily clad beauty whose adventures were chronicled in a strip cartoon in the Daily Mirror. It is also borne by the American film stars Jane Russell ( 1921–2011 ) and Jane Fonda ( b. 1937 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Jeanne De Rely was born in 1296, in Rely, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, France, her father, Écuyer Guillaume V de Rely, was 24 and her mother, Jéhanne De Caumont, was 16. She married Gilles II D'Authuille de Mailly in 1314, in Saint-Omer, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 3 daughters. She died in 1363, in Authuille, Somme, Hauts-de-France, France, at the age of 67.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Jeanne De Rely est née en 1296, à Rely, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, France, son père, Écuyer Guillaume V de Rely, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Jéhanne De Caumont, avait 16 ans. Elle a épousé Gilles II D'Authuille de Mailly en 1314, à Saint-Omer, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée en 1363, à Authuille, Somme, Hauts-de-France, France, à l’âge de 67 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Jeanne De Rely 1296 in Rely, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Écuyer Guillaume V de Rely 24 und ihre Mutter Jéhanne De Caumont 16. Sie hat 1314 in Saint-Omer, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Frankreich Gilles II D'Authuille de Mailly geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb 1363 im Alter von 67 Jahren in Authuille, Somme, Hauts-de-France, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Jeanne De Rely è nata il nel 1296 nel Rely, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Francia, sua padre, Écuyer Guillaume V de Rely, aveva 24 anni e sua madre, Jéhanne De Caumont, aveva 16 anni. Lei sposato Gilles II D'Authuille de Mailly nel 1314, nel Saint-Omer, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 3 figlie. Morì nel 1363, nel Authuille, Somme, Hauts-de-France, Francia, all'età di 67 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Jeanne De Relyが1296年にフランスハウトス-デ-フランスプアス-デ-カレイスレリーで生まれた時，父Écuyer Guillaume V de Relyは24歳，母Jéhanne De Caumontは16歳であった。1314年にフランスノード-プアス-デ-カレイスプアス-デ-カレイスサイント-オマーでGilles II D'Authuille de Maillyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1363年にフランスハウトス-デ-フランスソンメアウスウイルで67歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Jeanne De Rely(이)가 1296년 프랑스 하츠-데-프랜스 파스-데-캘레이 렐리에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Écuyer Guillaume V de Rely(은)는 24세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Jéhanne De Caumont(은)는 16세였다. 그녀는 1314년 프랑스 노르드-파스-데-캘레이 파스-데-캘레이 세인트-머에서 Gilles II D'Authuille de Mailly(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1363년 프랑스 하츠-데-프랜스 솜 오스이에서 67세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Jeanne De Rely nasceu em 1296, em Rely, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, França, seu pai, Écuyer Guillaume V de Rely, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Jéhanne De Caumont, tinha 16 anos. Ela casou-se com Gilles II D'Authuille de Mailly em 1314, em Saint-Omer, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1363, em Authuille, Somme, Hauts-de-France, França, com 67 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Jeanne De Rely родилась в 1296 г. в местности рели, пас-де-калеи, хауц-де-фрэнс, Франция, её отцу по имени Écuyer Guillaume V de Rely было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Jéhanne De Caumont, 16. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Gilles II D'Authuille de Mailly в 1314 г. в местности сеинт-омир, пас-де-калеи, норд-пас-де-калеи, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 3 дочери. Она умерла в 1363 г. в местности аутуилл, сомм, хауц-де-фрэнс, Франция в возрасте 67 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Jeanne De Rely nació en 1296, en Rely, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Francia, su papá, Écuyer Guillaume V de Rely, tenía 24 años y su mamá, Jéhanne De Caumont, tenía 16 años. Se casó con Gilles II D'Authuille de Mailly en 1314, en Saint-Omer, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió en 1363, en Authuille, Somme, Hauts-de-France, Francia, a la edad de 67 años.
